textPlain: Looks like a really fun project. You might want to reconsider the name though, since there is this other devbox from Jetify https://www.jetify.com/devbox that also received quite some attention on HN a while ago https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=32600821

FYI there's a well-starred, corporate-backed, similar functionality, Nix-based product with the same name:https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox
https://www.jetify.com/devbox
"There is already the Ford Model T"
